description: Complete schema for openCenter cluster configuration with validation rules and constraints

aws_access_key.description: AWS access key for cluster resources

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for cluster resources

cluster_name.description: Unique cluster name (used for resource naming)

k8s_api_port_acl.description: CIDR blocks allowed to access Kubernetes API server

dns_zone_name.description: DNS zone name for cluster services

flavor_master.description: Instance flavor/size for control plane nodes

master_nodes.description: Pre-configured master/control plane nodes for baremetal deployments

access_ip_v4.description: IPv4 address for accessing the node

name.description: Hostname or name of the node

network_plugin.description: Kubernetes network plugin (CNI) configuration. Only one plugin should be enabled at a time.

cni_iface.description: Network interface name for Calico CNI

enabled.description: Enable Calico as the CNI plugin
Enable Cilium as the CNI plugin

kubeProxyReplacement.description: Replace kube-proxy with Cilium's eBPF implementation

operator_enabled.description: Enable Cilium operator for advanced features

cilium_integration.description: Enable Cilium integration for advanced networking features

enabled.description: Enable Kube-OVN as the CNI plugin

worker_nodes.description: Pre-configured worker nodes for baremetal deployments

access_ip_v4.description: IPv4 address for accessing the node

name.description: Hostname or name of the node

ssh_authorized_keys.description: SSH public keys for node access

gitops.description: GitOps repository configuration for cluster manifests

branch.description: Git branch for GitOps base (mutually exclusive with release)

prune.description: Enable pruning of resources not in Git

git_dir.description: Local directory path for GitOps repository

git_ssh_key.description: Path to SSH private key for Git authentication

git_ssh_pub.description: Path to SSH public key for Git authentication

release.description: GitOps base release version (mutually exclusive with branch)

uri.description: Git repository URI for GitOps base

floating_network_id.description: External network ID for floating IPs

insecure.description: Skip TLS certificate verification (not recommended for production)

release.description: Release version or tag (mutually exclusive with branch)

uri.description: Git repository URI

aws_secret_access_key.description: AWS secret access key for cert-manager DNS validation

branch.description: Git branch for cert-manager (mutually exclusive with release)

email.description: Email address for Let's Encrypt certificate notifications

enabled.description: Enable cert-manager for automatic TLS certificate management

region.description: AWS region for Route53 DNS validation

release.description: Cert-manager release version (mutually exclusive with branch)

uri.description: Git repository URI for cert-manager

branch.description: Git branch for etcd-backup (mutually exclusive with release)

uri.description: Git repository URI for etcd-backup
